headlines.description: Bundesliga leaders Bayer Leverkusen scored twice late in the game with Robert Andrich and Patrik Schick to earn a 2-1 comeback win over Hoffenheim on Saturday and edge closer to the league title.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen late show extends unbeaten run to 39

video.headline: Leverkusen's late heroics extends unbeaten run to 39 games

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Leverkusen’s late heroics extends unbeaten run to 39 games) 2024/03/30 ESHEET

events.name: 1. FC Union Berlin at Eintracht Frankfurt

headlines.description: Bayern Munich's Bundesliga title hopes all but evaporated following a 2-0 home loss to Borussia Dortmund on Saturday that left them 13 points behind leaders Bayer Leverkusen with seven games remaining.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund win all but ends Bayern's title hopes

video.headline: Bayern title hopes in tatters after Dortmund defeat

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Bayern title hopes in tatters after Dortmund defeat) 2024/03/30 ESHEET
